title: Report run dialog supports date range parameter entry

comments.author: derek
comments.text:
As a report operator, I want to choose a start and end date in the run dialog, so that I can run analyses over precise windows without manual parameter math.

Feature: Report run date range parameter
Scenario: Provide a valid date range before running a report
Given a report configuration defines a required parameter named window of type date_range
When I open Run Report and choose both a start date and end date where start is before or equal to end
Then the dialog accepts the input
And dispatches the run with scalar parameters window_start and window_end in YYYY-MM-DD format

Scenario: Reject invalid date range
Given a report configuration defines a required parameter named window of type date_range
When I provide an end date earlier than the start date
Then the dialog shows a validation error and blocks submission

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Story behavior implemented and verified. Run Report dialog now supports required date_range entry with start/end controls, client-side ordering guard (end cannot be before start), and dispatch flattening to window_start/window_end. Parsing supports markdown report templates with YAML parameter header.
